제목: Domestic chicken franchise outlets top 30,000 as brands consolidate
본문:
By 
Yeon Ji-yeon
Published 2025.12.28. 10:14
Visitors look around booths to gather startup trends and information at the Franchise Startup and Industry Expo held at COEX in Gangnam District, Seoul. /Courtesy of News1
The number of domestic chicken franchise outlets has topped 30,000 for the first time.
According to the "2024 franchise statistics results" from the Ministry of Data and Statistics (MODS) on the 28th, chicken specialty franchises totaled 31,397 last year. That is an increase of 1,592, or 5.3%, from the previous year (29,805).
Among chicken brands, BBQ had the most franchise outlets. According to the Fair Trade Commission's franchise information disclosure system, BBQ had 2,316 outlets last year, up 67 from the previous year.
bhc, which had the most outlets last year, was tallied as having 48 fewer than the year before. bhc had 2,228 outlets.
Kyochon Chicken ranked third with 1,361 franchise outlets. It was followed by Cheogajip Yangnyeom Chicken (1,254) and Goobne Chicken (1,154). However, the number of chicken industry brands totaled 647 last year, down 22 from the previous year.

While the number of chicken franchise outlets has steadily increased, the total number of chicken restaurants, including non-franchise shops, has been declining for three straight years. According to the Ministry of Data and Statistics (MODS) Korean Statistical Information Service (KOSIS), the total number of chicken specialty restaurants nationwide, including franchise outlets and independent shops, was 39,789 in 2023, down by nearly 3,000 from 2020 (42,743).

제목: Household Private Education Costs Drop First Time Since COVID-19
본문:
By Choi On-jung(ChosunBiz)
Published 2025.12.21. 11:14
Households with children have seen their private education expenses decrease for the first time since the spread of the novel coronavirus disease (COVID-19). This decline is attributed to overall reduced consumption.
According to the National Statistical Portal (KOSIS) on the 21st, the average monthly private education expenditure for married couples with unmarried children in the third quarter of this year was 413,000 Korean won, a 0.7% decrease from a year ago. This marks the first year-on-year decline in private education costs for households with children since the fourth quarter of 2020, five years ago.
The reduction in private education spending aligns with broader consumption trends. The average propensity for consumption among households with unmarried children in the third quarter of this year was 68.0%, down 2.3 percentage points from the previous year. The average propensity for consumption refers to the ratio of consumption expenditure to disposable income, which is calculated by subtracting non-consumption expenses like taxes from total income.
The average disposable income of households with unmarried children increased by 5.3% to 6,661,000 Korean won compared to a year ago, while consumption expenditure rose by only 1.9% to 4,532,000 Korean won.

제목: Households cut hagwon spending as consumption weakens in South Korea
본문:
By 
Choi On-jung
Published 2025.12.21. 11:12
A view of the private academy district in Mok-dong, Yangcheon-gu, Seoul. /Courtesy of News1
Expenditure on private education by households with children fell for the first time since the spread of the novel coronavirus infection (COVID-19). The decline is seen as the result of weakened consumption affecting private education expenditure.
According to the Korean Statistical Information Service (KOSIS) on the 21st, the average monthly expenditure on students' hagwon tuition by married couples with unmarried children in the third quarter of this year was 413,000 won, down 0.7% from a year earlier. It is the first year-over-year decline in hagwon tuition for households with children in five years, since the fourth quarter of 2020.
The decline in hagwon tuition expenditure is tied to an overall contraction in consumption. In the third quarter of this year, the average propensity to consume among households with unmarried children was 68.0%, down 2.3 percentage points from a year earlier. The average propensity to consume refers to the ratio of consumption expenditure to disposable income, and disposable income is the amount remaining after subtracting non-consumption expenditure such as taxes from income.
The average monthly disposable income of households with unmarried children was 6,661,000 won, up 5.3% from a year earlier, but consumption expenditure rose only 1.9% to 4,532,000 won.

제목: 소비 위축에 학원비도 줄였다… 사교육비 지출, 코로나 이후 첫 감소
본문:
최온정 기자
입력 2025.12.21. 11:12
서울 양천구 목동 학원가 모습. /뉴스1
자녀가 있는 가구의 사교육비 지출이 신종 코로나바이러스 감염증(코로나19) 확산기 이후 처음으로 감소한 것으로 나타났다. 소비 위축이 사교육비 지출에도 영향을 미친 것으로 풀이된다.
21일 국가통계포털(KOSIS)에 따르면, 올해 3분기 미혼 자녀가 있는 부부 가구의 월평균 학생 학원 교육비 지출은 41만3000원으로, 1년 전보다 0.7% 줄었다. 자녀가 있는 가구의 학원 교육비가 전년 동기 대비 감소한 것은 2020년 4분기 이후 5년 만이다.
학원비 지출 감소는 전반적인 소비 위축과 맞물려 있다. 올해 3분기 미혼 자녀가 있는 가구의 평균소비성향은 68.0%로, 전년 대비 2.3%포인트(p) 하락했다. 평균소비성향은 처분가능소득 대비 소비지출 비율을 의미하며, 처분가능소득은 소득에서 세금 등 비소비지출을 제외한 금액이다.
미혼 자녀가 있는 가구의 월평균 처분가능소득은 666만1000원으로 1년 전보다 5.3% 증가했지만, 소비지출은 453만2000원으로 1.9% 늘어나는 데 그쳤다.

제목: South Korea's FDI Slump, Dollar Export Settlements Decline
본문:
By Choi On-jung(ChosunBiz)
Published 2025.12.21. 10:54
It has been identified that the performance in attracting foreign direct investment (FDI), which helps expand the dollar supply, has been sluggish. FDI refers to foreign investors establishing factories domestically or acquiring management rights with the purpose of participating in the management of Korean companies. This process leads to an inflow of dollars, resulting in a decrease in the won-to-dollar exchange rate.
According to the Ministry of Data and Statistics, the former Statistics Korea, National Statistical Portal, KOSIS, on the 21st, this year’s third-quarter FDI attraction performance (based on reports) was approximately $7.57 billion, 23.1% less than a year ago. Looking at the quarterly growth rates, it has decreased for three consecutive quarters since the first quarter of this year (-9.2%).
The rate of decrease was 9.2% in the first quarter, 19.1% in the second quarter of this year, and further increased in the third quarter. Accordingly, the cumulative FDI amount from the first to third quarters of this year is around $20.67 billion. This is a reduction of approximately $4.51 billion (17.9%) compared to the same period last year.
The ratio of receiving dollars through exports has also decreased. According to the Bank of Korea’s balance of payments statistics, the proportion of export payments settled in dollars in the second quarter of this year was 83.5% of total exports, down 0.9 percentage points from a year ago. Meanwhile, settlements in Korean won increased by 0.9 percentage points to 3.5%, and those in euros rose by 0.1 percentage points to 6.2%.
Meanwhile, the government is implementing various measures to increase the supply of US dollars by promoting foreign investment in the country. To prevent commercial banks from hoarding foreign currency, it has decided to temporarily postpone until June next year the supervisory measures applied to financial institutions that fail the foreign currency liquidity stress test.
The foreign currency liquidity stress test is a system that evaluates whether financial institutions can withstand a crisis situation where foreign currency funds rapidly outflow. For a certain period, foreign currency inflows must exceed outflows without fail each day. If this is not met, the institutions must submit a liquidity expansion plan to the supervisory authorities.

제목: FDI inflows drop while dollar settlements and export dollar share decline in Korea
본문:
By 
Choi On-jung
Published 2025.12.21. 10:52
Foreign direct investment (FDI), which helps expand the supply of dollars, was found to be sluggish. FDI refers to foreign investors establishing factories in Korea or acquiring management control for the purpose of participating in the management of Korean corporations. In this process, dollars flow in, which has the effect of pushing down the won-dollar exchange rate.
According to the Korean Statistical Information Service (KOSIS) of the National Data Office (formerly Statistics Korea) on the 21st, FDI attraction performance (based on filings) in the third quarter of this year was about $7.57 billion, down 23.1% from a year earlier. Looking at the quarterly growth rate, it fell for three straight quarters starting with the first quarter of this year (-9.2%).
An employee organizes U.S. dollars at the counterfeit response center at Hana Bank in Jung District, Seoul, on the 17th. /Courtesy of Yonhap News
The rate of decline was 9.2% in the first quarter of this year and 19.1% in the second quarter, and it grew larger in the third quarter. As a result, the cumulative FDI amount for the first to third quarters of this year stands at $20.67 billion. It shrank by about $4.51 billion (17.9%) from the same period last year.
The share of exports settled in dollars also fell. The Bank of Korea's balance of payments statistics show that the share of export proceeds settled in dollars in the second quarter of this year was 83.5% of total exports, down 0.9 percentage point (p) from a year earlier. In contrast, won settlements rose 0.9 percentage point to 3.5%, and euro settlements increased 0.1 percentage point to 6.2%.

Meanwhile, the government is rolling out various measures to increase dollar supply, including promoting foreign investment in Korea. To keep commercial banks from hoarding foreign currency, it decided to temporarily defer until June next year the supervisory measures applied to financial institutions that fail the foreign currency liquidity stress test.
The foreign currency liquidity stress test is a system that assesses whether a financial company can endure a crisis scenario in which foreign currency funds rapidly flow out. Over a set period, foreign currency inflows must exceed outflows every single day, and if this is not met, the institution must submit a liquidity augmentation plan to the supervisory authorities.

제목: 달러 수요 느는데 FDI는 저조… 수출대금 달러결제도 줄어
본문:
최온정 기자
입력 2025.12.21. 10:52
달러 공급 확대에 도움이 되는 외국인 직접투자(FDI) 유치 실적이 저조한 상황 것으로 파악됐다. FDI는 외국인 투자자가 한국 기업의 경영에 참여할 목적으로 국내에 공장을 설립하거나 경영권을 취득하는 것을 말한다. 이 과정에 달러가 유입돼 원·달러 환율이 내려가는 효과가 있다.
21일 국가데이터처(옛 통계청) 국가통계포털(KOSIS)에 따르면 올해 3분기 FDI 유치 실적(신고 기준)은 약 75억7000만달러로 1년 전보다 23.1% 적었다. 분기별 증가율을 보면 올해 1분기(-9.2%)부터 세 분기 연속 감소했다.
지난 17일 서울 중구 하나은행 위변조대응센터에서 직원이 달러화를 정리하고 있다. /연합뉴스
감소율은 올해 1분기 9.2%, 2분기 19.1%를 기록했고 3분기에 더 커졌다. 이에 따라 올해 1~3분기 FDI 누적 금액은 206억7000만달러 수준이다. 작년 같은 기간보다 약 45억1000만달러(17.9%) 축소했다.
수출을 하고 달러를 받는 비율도 낮아졌다. 한국은행 국제수지통계를 보면 올해 2분기 수출 대금이 달러로 결제된 비율은 전체 수출액의 83.5%로 1년 전보다 0.9%포인트(p) 하락했다. 반면 원화 결제는 0.9%p 높아진 3.5%, 유로화 결제는 0.1%p 오른 6.2%로 집계됐다.
한편 정부는 외국인의 국내 투자를 촉진하는 등 달러화 공급을 늘리기 위해 다양한 조치를 내놓고 있다. 시중은행이 외화를 쌓아두지 않도록, 외화유동성 스트레스 테스트를 통과하지 못한 금융기관에 적용되는 감독상 조치를 내년 6월까지 한시적으로 유예하기로 했다.
외화유동성 스트레스 테스트는 외화 자금이 급속하게 빠져 나가는 위기 상황을 설정해 금융사가 버틸 수 있는지를 평가하는 제도다. 일정 기간 외화 유입이 유출보다 하루도 빠짐없이 많아야 하며 만약 이를 충족하지 못하면 감독 당국에 유동성 확충계획을 내야 한다.

제목: South Korea's 40s Employment Slump Hits 41 Months
본문:
By Choi On-jung(ChosunBiz)
Published 2025.12.21. 10:01
The number of employed people in their 40s, a key pillar of South Korea's consumption and employment, has been decreasing for 3 years and 5 months.
According to the Ministry of Data and Statistics, formerly the Statistics Korea, via the national statistical portal, KOSIS, on the 21st, the number of employed people in their 40s last month was 6,154,000, a decrease of 9,000 from the same month last year. This marks the 41st consecutive month of decline since July 2022.
Job seekers look at a job posting bulletin board. /News1
After decreasing for 67 consecutive months from November 2015 to May 2021, the number of employed people in their 40s saw a slight increase but has resumed a long-term downward trend. The proportion of employed people in their 40s among all employed individuals stands at 21.2%, the lowest level for November since 1995.
The primary cause of the sluggish employment among people in their 40s is the 'decline in population.' The population in their 40s last month decreased by 129,000 compared to the same month last year. An optical illusion effect, where the employment rate (80.7%) appears to have risen as the population declined faster than the number of employed individuals, is also occurring.
The sluggish manufacturing sector is also cited as a major factor in the contraction of employment among people in their 40s. Employment in the manufacturing sector, which has a high proportion of people in their 40s, has been decreasing for 17 consecutive months. There are also diagnoses that the employment stability has rapidly weakened as large companies have lowered the age for voluntary retirement to the 40s, citing reasons such as the introduction of artificial intelligence (AI).
As employment contracts, household spending by households headed by individuals in their 40s is also decreasing. According to the Household Trends Survey, the growth rate of consumption expenditure for households headed by individuals in their 40s, based on non-agricultural, forestry, or fishery households with two or more members, was limited to 1.4% in the third quarter of this year. This is the lowest level in nine quarters since the second quarter of 2023.

제목: Employment among Koreans in their 40s falls for 41st month, squeezing consumption
본문:
By 
Choi On-jung
Published 2025.12.21. 09:58
Employed people in their 40s, the core of consumption and employment in the Korean economy, fell for the 41st consecutive month.
According to the Korea Data Agency (formerly Statistics Korea) Korean Statistical Information Service (KOSIS) on the 21st, the number of employed people in their 40s last month was 6,154,000, down 9,000 from a year earlier. It has been declining for 41 straight months since July 2022.
Job seekers look over a job posting board. /Courtesy of News1
After falling for 67 consecutive months from November 2015 to May 2021, the number of employed people in their 40s edged up slightly but has since returned to a prolonged decline. People in their 40s account for 21.2% of all employed. This is the lowest level for November since 1995.
The biggest reason for weak employment among people in their 40s is "population decline." The population in their 40s last month fell by 129,000 from a year earlier. As the population is shrinking faster than the number of employed, even an optical illusion has emerged that makes it appear the employment rate (80.7%) is rising.

한국 경제의 소비·고용 중심축인 40대 취업자가 3년 5개월째 감소했다.
21일 국가데이터처(옛 통계청) 국가통계포털(KOSIS)에 따르면 지난달 40대 취업자는 615만4000명으로 전년 동월보다 9000명 감소했다. 2022년 7월 이후 41개월 연속 감소세다.
취업준비생들이 채용공고게시대를 살펴보고 있다. /뉴스1
40대 취업자는 2015년 11월부터 2021년 5월까지 67개월 연속으로 감소한 이후 소폭 늘었으나, 다시 장기간 감소세를 이어가고 있다. 전체 취업자 가운데 40대가 차지하는 비중은 21.2%다. 1995년 이후 11월 기준 가장 낮은 수준이다.
40대 고용 부진의 가장 큰 원인은 '인구 감소'다. 지난달 40대 인구는 1년 전보다 12만 9000명 줄었다. 취업자보다 인구가 더 빠르게 줄면서 고용률(80.7%)이 상승한 것으로 보이는 착시 현상까지 나타나고 있다.
제조업 부진도 40대 고용 위축의 주요 요인으로 꼽힌다. 40대 비중이 높은 제조업 취업자는 17개월 연속 감소세다. 인공지능(AI) 도입 등을 이유로 대기업들이 희망퇴직 연령을 40대까지 낮추면서 고용 안정성이 급격히 약화됐다는 진단도 나온다.
고용이 위축되면서 가구주가 40대인 가구의 지출도 줄어들고 있다. 가계동향조사에 따르면, 2인 이상 비농림어가 기준 가구주가 40대인 가구의 올해 3분기 소비지출 증가율은 1.4%에 그쳤다. 2023년 2분기 이후 9분기 만에 가장 낮은 수준이다.

[땅집고] SK하이닉스가 용인 반도체 클러스터에 대한 투자 규모를 대폭 확대하기로 하면서 반도체 산업 전반은 물론 지식산업센터 등 관련 부동산 시장에도 기대감이 커지고 있다. 대규모 설비 투자에 따른 고용 증가와 기업 집적 효과가 맞물리며, 용인 일대가 ‘K-반도체’ 핵심 거점으로 자리 잡을 것이란 전망이 나온다.
[땅집고] '신광교 클라우드 시티 조감도./현대엔지니어링

15일 업계에 따르면 SK하이닉스는 용인 반도체 클러스터 투자 규모를 기존 약 120조원에서 600조원 수준으로 5배가량 확대할 계획이다. 용적률 상향에 따른 클린룸 면적 확대와 최첨단 공정 설비 도입 증가가 맞물리면서 투자 규모가 크게 늘어난 것으로 풀이된다.

실제 SK하이닉스 용인 클러스터 부지(A15)의 용적률은 기존 350%에서 490%로 상향 조정됐다. 이에 따라 클린룸 면적은 당초보다 약 1.5배 확대되고, 건축물 최고 높이도 120m에서 150m로 완화될 예정이다. 반도체 생산 능력 확대를 위한 물리적 기반이 한층 강화되는 셈이다.

대규모 투자에 따른 고용 효과도 상당할 것으로 예상된다. 업계에서는 연간 1만4000명에서 최대 2만명 수준의 고용 창출이 가능할 것으로 보고 있다. 중장기적으로는 반도체 산업 확대 속도에 따라 고용 증가세가 더욱 가속화될 가능성이 크다는 분석이 나온다.

이 같은 흐름은 통계에서도 확인된다. 국가통계포털(KOSIS)에 따르면 올해 상반기 용인시 경제활동인구는 58만2000명으로 전년 동기 대비 6000명 증가했다. 같은 기간 취업자 수 역시 55만3000명에서 56만명으로 7000명 늘었다.

업계 관계자는 “고용 확대와 함께 반도체 산업이 국가 경쟁력의 핵심 분야로 부상하면서 산업 생태계 확장이 본격화될 것”이라며 “용인이 K-반도체의 중심 거점으로 자리 잡을수록 기업 유입과 집적 효과가 강화되고, 이에 따라 지식산업센터 수요도 꾸준히 늘어날 가능성이 높다”고 말했다.

초고화질 그래픽으로 구현된 광활한 우주 전선을 지금 탐험하세요.
파운데이션: 우주 전선
지금 플레이하기

반도체 배후 수요를 겨냥한 지식산업센터에도 관심이 쏠리고 있다. 현대엔지니어링이 경기 용인시 기흥구 영덕동 삼성삼거리 인근에서 조성 중인 ‘신광교 클라우드 시티’는 대표적인 수혜 단지로 거론된다. 이 단지는 국내 첨단 반도체 산업의 중심으로 평가받는 삼성디지털시티 수원사업장과 인접해 있어 관련 협력업체들의 배후 수요를 흡수하기에 유리한 입지를 갖췄다는 평가다.

교통 여건도 강점으로 꼽힌다. 단지에서 경부고속도로 수원신갈IC까지 약 4.7km 거리에 있으며, 용서고속도로 흥덕IC와 영동고속도로 동수원IC 접근성도 양호해 주요 산업단지로의 이동이 수월하다. 반도체 산업과의 연계 시너지를 높일 수 있는 입지 조건을 갖췄다는 분석이다.

분양 관계자는 “SK하이닉스를 비롯한 대기업의 대규모 투자가 이어지면서 용인 지역 반도체 산업의 성장세가 지속될 것으로 보인다”며 “지역 특성상 반도체 관련 소재·부품·장비 기업과 연구개발(R&D) 기반 기업 유입이 확대될 가능성이 높아 지식산업센터의 가치 역시 중장기적으로 높아질 것”이라고 말했다. /hongg@chosun.com

제목: Young Households' Surplus Falls 2.7%, First Decline in Three Years
본문:
By Sejong=Lee Ju-hyeong(ChosunBiz)
Published 2025.12.14. 10:27
The disposable income of the generation in their 20s and 30s has decreased again in three years, making it difficult to increase assets through savings or investments. This is due to the slowdown in income growth while housing and interest burdens have rapidly increased.
According to the Ministry of Data and Statistics' National Statistical Portal (KOSIS) on the 14th, as of the third quarter of this year, the average monthly surplus of households headed by individuals under 39 years old was 1,243,000 Korean won, a 2.7% decrease from the same period last year. This marks the first decrease in three years since the third quarter of 2022. During the same period, the average monthly surplus of all household heads increased by 12.2% to 1,437,000 Korean won, presenting a stark contrast.
The surplus is calculated by subtracting non-consumption expenditures such as taxes and interest, and consumption expenditures like food and housing costs from household income. It typically represents disposable income that can be used for savings or investments.
The reduction in disposable income among young people stems from slowed income growth and expanded expenditures. The average monthly income of households headed by individuals under 39 years old in the third quarter was 5,036,000 Korean won, an increase of only 0.9% (46,000 Korean won) compared to the same period last year. This is the lowest growth rate and smallest increase in the third quarter since the statistics were first compiled in 2019. When accounting for inflation, real income has effectively decreased.
Regular income increased by 1.3% to 4,950,000 Korean won, but the growth rate was the lowest since the third quarter of 2022. Labor income decreased by 0.9% to 3,771,000 Korean won, marking the first decline in five years, while business income (530,000 Korean won) has decreased for three consecutive years. In contrast, public transfer income, including government and local government support funds, increased by nearly 60% to 441,000 Korean won, influenced by measures such as the distribution of livelihood recovery consumption coupons.
Expenditure burdens have increased more rapidly. In the third quarter, average monthly consumption expenditures increased by 3.1% to 2,859,000 Korean won, with actual housing costs rising by 11.9% to 214,000 Korean won. Interest expenses also surged by 23.4% to 166,000 Korean won, further burdening young households.
The decrease in disposable income is also linked to the increasing number of young people outside the workforce. As of last month, there were 1,589,000 individuals in their 20s and 30s who were unemployed, preparing for employment, or taking a break, an increase of 28,000 from the same period last year.

본문:
By 
Lee Ju-hyeong
Published 2025.12.14. 10:25
A job openings bulletin board at the Seoul Western Employment Welfare Plus Center in Mapo District, Seoul. /Courtesy of Yonhap News
The spare money of people in their 20s and 30s shrank again for the first time in three years, making it harder to grow asset through savings or investment. While income growth slowed, housing costs and interest burdens rose quickly.
According to the Korean Statistical Information Service (KOSIS) on the 14th, as of the third quarter this year, the average monthly surplus for households headed by those under 39 was 1,243,000 won, down 2.7% from a year earlier. It was the first decline in the surplus since the third quarter of 2022, three years ago. Over the same period, the surplus for all household heads was 1,437,000 won, up 12.2%, in contrast.
The surplus is the amount left after subtracting non-consumption expenditure such as taxes and interest, and consumption expenditure such as food and housing costs, from household income, and generally means spare money that can be used for savings or investment.
The decline in young people's spare money stems from a combination of slowing income growth and rising expenditure. In the third quarter, the average monthly income of household heads under 39 was 5,036,000 won, up only 0.9% (46,000 won) from a year earlier. This is the lowest third-quarter growth rate and increase in amount since statistics began in 2019. Considering inflation, real income effectively fell.

Earned income was 3,771,000 won, down 0.9%, marking the first drop in five years, and business income (530,000 won) also fell for the third straight year. In contrast, public transfer income, including support from the government and local governments, rose to 441,000 won, increasing by nearly 60% due to the payment of consumption coupons to help people's livelihoods recover.
The expenditure burden rose faster. Third-quarter consumption expenditure averaged 2,859,000 won per month, up 3.1%, and among that, actual housing costs were 214,000 won, up 11.9%. Interest costs also surged 23.4% to 166,000 won, increasing the burden on young household.
The decrease in spare money also aligns with the trend of more young people being outside the job market. As of last month, the number of people in their 20s and 30s who were unemployed, preparing for employment, or taking a break was 1,589,000, up 28,000 from a year earlier.

제목: "월세 내고 빚 갚으면 남는 게 없다"… 2030 여윳돈 3년 만에 마이너스
본문:
세종=이주형 기자
입력 2025.12.14. 10:25
서울 마포구 서울서부고용복지플러스센터 구인 정보 게시판 모습. /연합뉴스
2030세대의 여윳돈이 3년 만에 다시 줄어들며 저축이나 투자로 자산을 늘리기 어려워진 것으로 나타났다. 소득 증가세는 둔화된 반면 주거비와 이자 부담이 빠르게 늘어난 영향이다.
14일 국가데이터처 국가통계포털(KOSIS)에 따르면 올해 3분기 기준 39세 이하 가구주의 월평균 흑자액은 124만3000원으로, 지난해 같은 기간보다 2.7% 감소했다. 흑자액이 줄어든 것은 2022년 3분기 이후 3년 만이다. 같은 기간 전체 가구주의 흑자액은 143만7000원으로 12.2% 증가해 대조를 이뤘다.
흑자액은 가구소득에서 세금과 이자 등 비소비지출, 식비·주거비 등 소비지출을 뺀 금액으로, 통상 저축이나 투자에 활용할 수 있는 여윳돈을 의미한다.
청년층 여윳돈 감소는 소득 증가 둔화와 지출 확대가 맞물린 결과다. 3분기 39세 이하 가구주의 월평균 소득은 503만6000원으로 1년 전보다 0.9%(4만6000원) 늘어나는 데 그쳤다. 이는 2019년 통계 작성 이후 3분기 기준 증가율과 증가 폭 모두 가장 낮은 수준이다. 물가 상승을 고려하면 실질소득은 감소한 셈이다.
경상소득은 495만원으로 1.3% 증가했지만 증가율은 2022년 3분기 이후 가장 낮았다. 근로소득은 377만1000원으로 0.9% 줄어 5년 만에 감소했고, 사업소득(53만원)도 3년 연속 줄었다. 반면 정부와 지자체 지원금을 포함한 공적 이전소득은 44만1000원으로 민생회복 소비쿠폰 지급 등의 영향으로 60% 가까이 증가했다.
지출 부담은 더 빠르게 증가했다. 3분기 소비지출은 월평균 285만9000원으로 3.1% 늘었고, 이 가운데 실제 주거비는 21만4000원으로 11.9% 증가했다. 이자비용도 16만6000원으로 23.4% 급증해 청년층 가계 부담을 키웠다.
여윳돈 감소는 일자리 밖 청년 증가 흐름과도 맞물려 있다. 지난달 기준 실직 상태이거나 취업 준비 중, 또는 쉬고 있는 2030세대는 158만9000명으로 1년 전보다 2만8000명 늘었다.

제목: Celltrion's Remsima IV Tops Domestic Production for Second Year
본문:
By Hong In-seok(ChosunBiz)
Published 2025.12.14. 09:35
Illustration by Chat GPT
Celltrion's autoimmune disease treatment 'Remsima IV' has ranked first in domestic pharmaceutical production for two consecutive years. According to the pharmaceutical and biotech industry and Statistics Korea's National Statistical Portal (KOSIS) on the 14th, as of September this year, the production value of 'Remsima IV 100 mg' last year was approximately 380 billion Korean won. This is the highest among the top 20 pharmaceuticals in the country. Remsima IV also ranked first in 2023 with a production value of approximately 230 billion Korean won, marking a 63% increase in production value within a year.
Remsima is an antibody biosimilar developed by Celltrion as the world's first, used to treat autoimmune diseases such as Crohn's disease, ankylosing spondylitis, ulcerative colitis, and rheumatoid arthritis. Its global sales exceeded 1 trillion Korean won last year.
The second and third places in production value were occupied by HK inno.N's 'K-CAB Tablet 50 mg' and Daewoong Pharmaceutical's 'Nabota IV', respectively. The two products recorded production values of approximately 173 billion Korean won and 170 billion Korean won last year, respectively, ranking 5th and 6th by production value in 2023.
K-CAB is a potassium-competitive acid blocker (P-CAB) class treatment for gastroesophageal reflux disease and the 30th new drug in South Korea. Since its domestic launch in 2019, it has recorded cumulative prescriptions of 810.1 billion Korean won up to the first half of this year. It recently succeeded in a phase 3 clinical trial in the U.S. and is preparing to apply for FDA approval.
Nabota, a botulinum toxin preparation, was launched domestically in 2014. It received FDA approval in the U.S. in 2019, the first in Asia. It has now received approvals in various regions including North and South America, Europe, Asia, and Oceania, and recently expanded into 10 out of 20 countries in the Middle East and North Africa (MENA).
In terms of production value in 2023, the second and third places were held by Dong-A ST's growth hormone agent 'Grotropin II Injection Cartridge' and LG Chem's 'Utrophin SP Injection'.
According to KOSIS, the number of pharmaceutical production companies and their production values also showed growth. The number of raw pharmaceutical manufacturers increased by 6.4% to 315 last year compared to the previous year, with production value rising by 16.8% to approximately 4 trillion Korean won. The number of finished pharmaceutical manufacturers slightly decreased to 400, but their production value increased by 5.9% to 28.46 trillion Korean won.

제목: Celltrion's Remsima tops South Korea drug production value for second year
본문:
By 
Hong In-seok
Published 2025.12.14. 09:32
Illustration = Chat GPT
Celltrion's autoimmune disease treatment "Remsima injection" ranked No. 1 in domestic pharmaceutical production value for the second straight year.
On the 14th, according to the pharmaceutical and biotech industry and the Korean Statistical Information Service (KOSIS), as of September this year, last year's production value of "Remsima injection 100 mg" was estimated at about 380 billion won. It is the highest among the top 20 domestic pharmaceuticals. Remsima injection also ranked No. 1 in 2023 with a production value of about 230 billion won. In one year, the production value increased by about 63%.
Remsima is the world's first antibody biosimilar developed by Celltrion and is used to treat autoimmune diseases such as Crohn's disease, ankylosing spondylitis, ulcerative colitis, and rheumatoid arthritis. Last year's global sales topped 1 trillion won.
Second and third in production value were HK inno.N's "K-CAB tablet 50 mg" and Daewoong Pharmaceutical Co.'s "Nabota injection," respectively. The two products' production values last year were about 173 billion won and 170 billion won, respectively, and in 2023 they ranked fifth and sixth by production value.
K-CAB is a potassium-competitive acid blocker (P-CAB) class treatment for gastroesophageal reflux disease and is the 30th new drug in Korea. Since its domestic launch in 2019, cumulative prescription sales reached 810.1 billion won through the first half of this year. It recently succeeded in a U.S. phase 3 trial and is preparing to file for FDA approval.

Nabota is a botulinum toxin product that was launched in Korea in 2014. In 2019, it became the first in Asia to win U.S. FDA approval. It has been approved in several regions, including North America, South America, Europe, Asia, and Oceania, and recently expanded into 10 of 20 countries in the Middle East and North Africa (MENA).
By 2023 production value, second and third were Dong-A ST's growth hormone "Grotropin Two injection solution cartridge" and LG CHEM's "Utropin S pen injection."
According to KOSIS, the number of pharmaceutical manufacturers and total production value also increased. The number of active pharmaceutical ingredient manufacturers rose 6.4% year over year to 315 last year, and production value increased 16.8% to about 4 trillion won. The number of finished drug manufacturers edged down to 400, but production value rose 5.9% to 28.46 trillion won.

14일 제약·바이오 업계와 통계청 국가통계포털(KOSIS)에 따르면 올해 9월 기준 '램시마주100㎎'의 지난해 생산액은 약 3800억원으로 집계됐다. 국내 상위 20개 의약품 가운데 가장 높은 수준이다. 램시마주는 2023년에도 약 2300억원의 생산액으로 1위를 기록했다. 1년 만에 생산액이 약 63% 증가했다.
램시마는 셀트리온이 세계 최초로 개발한 항체 바이오시밀러로, 크론병·강직성 척추염·궤양성 대장염·류머티즘성 관절염 등 자가면역질환 치료에 사용된다. 지난해 글로벌 매출은 1조원을 넘어섰다.
생산액 2위와 3위는 각각 HK이노엔(40,800원 ▲ 1,550 3.95%)의 '케이캡정50㎎'과 대웅제약(131,900원 ▲ 300 0.23%)의 '나보타주'가 차지했다. 두 제품의 지난해 생산액은 각각 약 1730억원, 1700억원으로, 2023년에는 생산액 기준 5위와 6위였다.
케이캡은 칼륨 경쟁적 위산분비억제제(P-CAB) 계열의 위식도 역류 질환 치료제로 국내 30호 신약이다. 2019년 국내 출시 이후 올해 상반기까지 누적 처방액 8101억원을 기록했다. 최근 미국 임상 3상에 성공하며 FDA 허가 신청을 앞두고 있다.
나보타는 보툴리눔 톡신 제제로 2014년 국내 출시됐다. 2019년 아시아 최초로 미국 FDA 승인을 받았다. 현재 북미와 남미, 유럽, 아시아, 오세아니아 등 여러 지역에서 허가를 받았고, 최근에는 중동·북아프리카(MENA) 20개국 중 10개국으로 진출했다.

제목: Ministry of Economy and Finance Reviews Fuel Tax Cut Extension, Subsidies
본문:
By Sejong=Ahn So-young(ChosunBiz)
Updated 2025.12.11. 16:01
Fuel price information is posted at a gas station in downtown Seoul. /News1
The government announced on the 11th that it is reviewing an extension of fuel tax reductions and the payment of diesel/CNG price-linked subsidies.
The Ministry of Economy and Finance stated this in a work report to President Lee Jae-myung on the same day. This is interpreted as a response to petroleum product prices rising for the first time in three years since 2022. According to the Ministry of Data and Statistics’ national statistical portal (KOSIS), consumer prices for petroleum products from January to November rose 2.1% compared to the same period last year.
The Ministry of Economy and Finance partially reduced the scope of fuel tax cuts on November 1 but is considering maintaining the current reduction level to stabilize living costs. The current fuel tax reduction rates are 7% for gasoline and 10% for diesel and LPG butane.
Alongside this, the government decided to designate vice-ministerial level officials from each ministry as ‘Price Stability Responsibles’ and implement fundamental price stabilization measures, including extending tariff quotas for 22 food raw materials and strengthening monitoring of collusion in key food products such as pork, eggs, sugar, and flour.
Support for low-income and vulnerable groups will also be expanded. The government plans to increase the number of beneficiaries for the '1,000 Won Breakfast' program, expand energy vouchers for vulnerable groups, and strengthen cost-of-living reduction policies such as a fixed-rate transportation pass for all citizens and a data safety option for communication fees.
Additionally, youth employment measures were announced. The Ministry of Economy and Finance plans to prepare customized support measures for different types of ‘resting’ youth in the first quarter of next year and expand work experience through online and offline AI education, vocational training, and support for obtaining AI certifications. Furthermore, the government will identify at-risk groups facing long-term unemployment early, provide them with psychological counseling and opportunities to participate in social activities, and assist them in entering the labor market.

제목: Korea reviews fuel tax cut extension and expands cost-of-living, youth support
본문:
By 
Ahn So-young
Updated 2025.12.11. 15:51
Fuel price information is posted at a gas station in Seoul. /Courtesy of News1
The government said on the 11th that it will consider extending the fuel tax cut and the diesel/CNG fuel price-linked subsidy.
The Ministry of Economy and Finance stated accordingly in a work report to President Lee Jae-myung that day. It is seen as an effect of petroleum prices rising this year for the first time in three years since 2022. According to the Korean Statistical Information Service (KOSIS), consumer prices for petroleum products rose 2.1% year over year in January–November.
The Ministry of Economy and Finance (MOEF) partially reduced the fuel tax cut range on Nov. 1, but is reviewing a plan to maintain the current cut to stabilize the cost of living. The current fuel tax cut rates are 7% for gasoline and 10% for diesel/LPG butane.
Along with this, the government will designate each ministry's Vice Minister as a "price stability officer," extend quota tariff measures on 22 food ingredients, and simultaneously push fundamental price stabilization steps such as strengthening monitoring of price-fixing in key foods including pork, eggs, sugar, and flour.
